predicates.name: is_alien
predicates.description: The person does not provide proof that they possess Belgian nationality.

predicates.name: is_third_country_national
predicates.description: The person is not a Union citizen and not a person enjoying the Community right of free movement.

predicates.name: in_illegal_residence
predicates.description: The person is present on the territory without meeting the conditions for entry or residence.

predicates.name: subject_to_removal_procedure
predicates.description: The person is subject to a removal procedure.

predicates.name: subject_to_international_protection_procedure
predicates.description: The person is subject to a procedure for the granting of international protection.

predicates.name: subject_to_dublin_transfer_procedure
predicates.description: The person is subject to a procedure for determining or transferring to the Member State responsible for examining the application for international protection.

predicates.name: individual_examination_performed
predicates.description: An individual examination has been performed in respect of the person.

predicates.name: no_residence_application_after_illegal_entry
predicates.description: The person has not submitted a residence application following illegal entry or during illegal residence.

predicates.name: no_international_protection_application_in_time
predicates.description: The person has not made an application for international protection within the statutory time limit.

predicates.name: used_false_information_or_documents
predicates.description: The person has used false or misleading information or false or falsified documents in a relevant procedure.

predicates.name: committed_fraud_or_unlawful_means
predicates.description: The person has committed fraud or used other unlawful means in a relevant procedure.

predicates.name: does_not_cooperate_with_authorities
predicates.description: The person does not cooperate or has not cooperated with the authorities responsible for access, residence, establishment, and removal regulations.

predicates.name: declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_transfer_measure
predicates.description: The person has made clear they do not wish to comply with or has already failed to comply with a transfer, refusal-of-entry, or removal measure.

predicates.name: declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_entry_ban
predicates.description: The person has made clear they do not wish to comply with or has already failed to comply with an entry ban that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

predicates.name: declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_less_coercive_measure
predicates.description: The person has made clear they do not wish to comply with or has already failed to comply with a less coercive measure aimed at guaranteeing transfer, refusal of entry, or removal.

predicates.name: declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_liberty_restricting_measure
predicates.description: The person has made clear they do not wish to comply with or has already failed to comply with a liberty-restricting measure aimed at guaranteeing public order or national security.

predicates.name: declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_equivalent_member_state_measure
predicates.description: The person has made clear they do not wish to comply with or has already failed to comply with a measure taken by another Member State equivalent to the listed measures.

predicates.name: subject_to_unlifted_entry_ban_in_kingdom
predicates.description: The person is subject to an entry ban in the Kingdom that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

predicates.name: subject_to_unlifted_entry_ban_in_member_state
predicates.description: The person is subject to an entry ban in another Member State that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

predicates.name: submitted_new_application_immediately_after_negative_decision
predicates.description: Immediately after a decision refusing entry or residence, terminating residence, or a refusal-of-entry or removal measure, the person submitted a new residence or international protection application.

predicates.name: concealed_prior_fingerprints_in_dublin_state
predicates.description: When questioned, the person concealed that they had already provided fingerprints in another Dublin-bound State after submitting an international protection application there.

predicates.name: submitted_multiple_applications_with_negative_outcome
predicates.description: The person has submitted multiple international protection and/or residence applications in the Kingdom or other Member States that resulted in negative decisions or no residence permit.

predicates.name: concealed_prior_international_protection_application
predicates.description: When questioned, the person concealed that they had previously submitted an international protection application in another Dublin-bound State.

predicates.name: came_for_purposes_other_than_stated_application
predicates.description: The person declared or it appears from their file that they came to the Kingdom for purposes other than those for which they submitted an application.

predicates.name: subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unlawful_appeal
predicates.description: The person is subject to a fine because they submitted a manifestly unlawful appeal to the Council for Alien Law Litigation.

predicates.name: possesses_valid_travel_document
predicates.description: The person is in possession of a valid travel document, valid passport, or valid identity document.

predicates.name: recognised_as_national_by_home_authority
predicates.description: The person has been recognised as a national by the national authority of their country, which has declared itself willing to issue a laissez-passer.

predicates.name: falls_within_ministerial_laissez_passer_nationality_category
predicates.description: The person falls within the category of nationalities for which the minister may personally issue a laissez-passer.

predicates.name: at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met
predicates.description: At least one of the objective criteria listed in paragraph 2 for risk of absconding is established for the person.

predicates.name: is_identified_alien
predicates.description: The person qualifies as an identified alien under the statutory definition.

predicates.name: risk_of_absconding
predicates.description: There is a legally established risk of absconding in respect of the person.
